title: OfferLink Chrome Extension - SelectAdapter Architecture
summary: Complete knowledge of the OfferLink Chrome extension's SelectAdapter factory pattern architecture for handling form dropdowns/selects across 14 UI frameworks. Covers the reverse engineering process from extracted webpack modules, the BaseSelectAdapter base class, SelectAdapter factory with detectType() routing, and all framework-specific adapters including the critical PhoenixSelectAdapter for cascader (multi-level province/city/district) selection. Includes integration pattern with formFiller.js using adapter-first with SelectHelper fallback.
